creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
In my installation, /usr/ports is a symlink to /.../hal/z/SRC/FreeBSD-ports/head (using amd(8); the '...' is the literal automount directory).

Since recently I have the following behavior where RUN_DEPENDS gets cleared if PORTSDIR is set:

[0]# pushd /usr/ports/archivers/ark 
/usr/ports/archivers/ark ~
[0]# make -V RUN_DEPENDS -V LIB_DEPENDS -V BUILD_DEPENDS -V EXTRACT_DEPENDS
7z:archivers/p7zip unrar:archivers/unrar  rar:archivers/rar unzip>0:archivers/unzip  zip:archivers/zip
libqjson.so:devel/qjson libkdecore.so:x11/kdelibs4 libkonq.so:x11/libkonq libarchive.so.13:archivers/libarchive libQtTest.so:devel/qt4-testlib
/usr/local/bin/cmake:devel/cmake /usr/local/bin/automoc4:devel/automoc4 /usr/local/bin/moc-qt4:devel/qt4-moc /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4:devel/qmake4 /usr/local/bin/rcc:devel/qt4-rcc /usr/local/bin/uic-qt4:devel/qt4-uic
git:/.../hal/z/SRC/FreeBSD-ports/head/devel/git
[0]# PORTSDIR=/usr/ports make -V RUN_DEPENDS -V LIB_DEPENDS -V BUILD_DEPENDS -V EXTRACT_DEPENDS

libqjson.so:devel/qjson libkdecore.so:x11/kdelibs4 libkonq.so:x11/libkonq libarchive.so.13:archivers/libarchive libQtTest.so:devel/qt4-testlib
/usr/local/bin/cmake:devel/cmake /usr/local/bin/automoc4:devel/automoc4 /usr/local/bin/moc-qt4:devel/qt4-moc /usr/local/bin/qmake-qt4:devel/qmake4 /usr/local/bin/rcc:devel/qt4-rcc /usr/local/bin/uic-qt4:devel/qt4-uic
git:/usr/ports/devel/git
[0]# 

Something seems to be broken with computing RUN_DEPENDS.
